zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul Ier de Beaugency於1068年出生在法國崔洛易特奧爾萊安斯波奧勒希時，他的父親Lancelin II de Beaugency29歲，母親Alberge du Maine31歲。他與Mathilde de Vermandois在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1130年享年63歲，埋葬在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul Ier de Beaugency于1068年出生在法国崔洛易特奧爾萊安斯波奧勒希时，他的父亲Lancelin II de Beaugency29岁，母亲Alberge du Maine31岁。他与Mathilde de Vermandois在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特波奧勒希结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1130年享年63岁，埋葬在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul Ier de Beaugency was born in 1068, in Beaugency, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France, his father, Lancelin II de Beaugency, was 29 and his mother, Alberge du Maine, was 31. He married Mathilde de Vermandois in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1130, at the age of 63, and was buried in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul Ier de Beaugency est né en 1068, à Beaugency, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Lancelin II de Beaugency, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alberge du Maine, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Vermandois à Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1130, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à France.

Er hat in Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich Mathilde de Vermandois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1130 im Alter von 63 Jahren und wurde in Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul Ier de Beaugency è nato il nel 1068 nel Beaugency, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Lancelin II de Beaugency, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alberge du Maine, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Vermandois nel Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1130, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul Ier de Beaugencyが1068年にフランスセントアロイアーエトオルルeアンスビーウジェンシで生まれた時，父Lancelin II de Beaugencyは29歳，母Alberge du Maineは31歳であった。フランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトビーウジェンシでMathilde de Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1130年に63歳で死去し，フランスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul Ier de Beaugency(이)가 1068년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 올를e아스 보겐시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lancelin II de Beaugency(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alberge du Maine(은)는 31세였다. 그는 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 보겐시에서 Mathilde de Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1130년 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul Ier de Beaugency nasceu em 1068, em Beaugency, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Lancelin II de Beaugency, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alberge du Maine, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Vermandois em Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1130, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em França.

ru.Beaugency, Loiret, France: бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul Ier de Beaugency родился в 1068 г. в местности бодженси, орлeанс, лоирет, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Lancelin II de Beaugency было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alberge du Maine, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Vermandois в местности бодженси, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1130 г. в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul Ier de Beaugency nació en 1068, en Beaugency, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Lancelin II de Beaugency, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alberge du Maine, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Vermandois en Beaugency, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1130, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Francia.
